user.title: Storcube Battery
user.description: Credentials for your STORCUBE mobile app account. These are not your Home Assistant credentials, nor those of an MQTT broker.

data_description.device_id: Serial number of the master battery, shown in the app.
data_description.login_name: Your full email address if that is how you signed up.
data_description.app_code: Leave the default value unless told otherwise.

reauth_confirm.title: Storcube reauthentication
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for battery {device_id} were rejected. Please enter them again.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Storcube battery
reconfigure.description: Change the connection settings. The equipment ID must stay that of the battery already configured.

abort.wrong_device: This ID does not match the configured battery.

init.title: Storcube options
init.description: To change your credentials, use “Reconfigure” on the entry rather than these options.

data_description.rest_interval: Between 15 and 600 seconds. Real-time data comes over the WebSocket and is unaffected.

set_power.name: Set output power
set_power.description: Sets the output power setpoint of the StorCube battery.

device_id.name: Equipment ID
device_id.description: Only required when several entries are configured.

set_threshold.name: Set discharge threshold
set_threshold.description: Sets the charge level below which the battery stops discharging.

device_id.name: Equipment ID
device_id.description: Only required when several entries are configured.

check_firmware.name: Check firmware
check_firmware.description: Queries the StorCube API and returns the installed version, the latest available version and the release notes.

device_id.name: Equipment ID
device_id.description: Only required when several entries are configured.
